rationale: Fingerprint `JSON.parse(...).map(FN)` (distinct bucket from `parse-map` due to shape-flag variations). Same root issue: JS consumes a top-level JSON array. Input `"[]"` routes every variant through `.map()` on an empty array → `[]`; Rust `json_extract` on `"[]"` also returns `[]`. Sad-path agreement. Follow-up: a `json_array_extract` transform (see `parse-map` fixture rationale).
